license_posture: Census TIGERweb county geometry is a U.S. Census Bureau public data endpoint; this repo commits only a four-county generalized fixture.
caveats: Fixture geometry is generalized for local candidate-map inspection and should not be used as a raw national GIS cache.
National exploratory geometry is generated under ignored target paths by scripts/write-national-exploratory-county-maps.ps1.
County boundaries are administrative geometry, not legal time-zone assignment evidence.
